---
title: "Analysis"
author: "Meg"
date: "2026-03-26"
execute:
  eval: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# 1 Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup-analysis
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidycmprsk)
library(ggsurvfit)

# Load final_master from data management output
final_master <- readRDS("final_master.rds")
```

# 2 Derived Variables for Plots

```{r}
#| label: derived-vars
# Hospitalization binary (from REDCap hosp_status_90d)
final_master <- final_master %>%
  mutate(
    hosp_90 = case_when(
      hosp_status_90d == "Yes" ~ 1,
      hosp_status_90d == "No"  ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    platinum_related_hosp = ifelse(side_effect == 1, 1, 0),
    cc_percentile = ntile(cr_cys, 100),
    cc_decile     = ntile(cr_cys, 10)
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: decile-rates
# Compute event rates by decile
final_master <- final_master %>%
  group_by(cc_decile) %>%
  mutate(
    anemia_2_rate_decile              = mean(Anemia_g2_90days, na.rm = TRUE),
    anemia_3_rate_decile              = mean(Anemia_g3_90days, na.rm = TRUE),
    throm_2_rate_decile               = mean(Throm_g2_90days, na.rm = TRUE),
    throm_3_rate_decile               = mean(Throm_g3_90days, na.rm = TRUE),
    aki_2_rate_decile                 = mean(AKI_g2_90days, na.rm = TRUE),
    aki_3_rate_decile                 = mean(AKI_g3_90days, na.rm = TRUE),
    hos_rate_decile                   = mean(hosp_90, na.rm = TRUE),
    platinum_related_hos_rate_decile  = mean(platinum_related_hosp, na.rm = TRUE),
    death_rate_decile                 = mean(death_90, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(cc_decile = as.numeric(cc_decile))
```

```{r}
#| label: decile-summary
# Summarize cr_cys ratio by decile
summary_by_decile <- final_master %>%
  group_by(cc_decile) %>%
  summarise(
    n      = n(),
    min    = min(cr_cys, na.rm = TRUE),
    q1     = quantile(cr_cys, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(cr_cys, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean   = mean(cr_cys, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3     = quantile(cr_cys, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    max    = max(cr_cys, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd     = sd(cr_cys, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

# 3 LOESS Plot Function

```{r}
#| label: fn-loess-plot
loess_plot <- function(data, x, y, x_point, y_point, title, xlab, ylab) {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = {{x}}, y = {{y}})) +
    geom_point(aes(x = {{x_point}}, y = {{y_point}}),
               size = 6, color = "black", shape = 19) +
    geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, span = 0.75, color = "blue", linewidth = 2) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 10)) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
    labs(title = title, x = xlab, y = ylab) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.title.x  = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.title.y  = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.text.x   = element_text(size = 16),
      axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 16),
      plot.title     = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold")
    ) +
    annotate("rect", xmin = 1, xmax = 25, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
             alpha = 0.2, fill = "yellow")
}
```

# 4 LOESS Plots by Percentile

## 4.1 Grade 2 Anemia

```{r}
#| label: plot-anemia-2
loess_plot(
  data = final_master, x = cc_percentile, y = Anemia_g2_90days,
  x_point = cc_decile * 10, y_point = anemia_2_rate_decile,
  title = "Grade >= 2 Anemia",
  xlab = "Percentile of SCR/CYS Ratio", ylab = "Grade >= 2 Anemia"
)
```

## 4.2 Grade 3 Thrombocytopenia

```{r}
#| label: plot-throm-3
loess_plot(
  data = final_master, x = cc_percentile, y = Throm_g3_90days,
  x_point = cc_decile * 10, y_point = throm_3_rate_decile,
  title = "Grade >= 3 Thrombocytopenia",
  xlab = "Percentile of SCR/CYS Ratio", ylab = "Grade >= 3 Thrombocytopenia"
)
```

## 4.3 Grade 3 AKI (Creatinine Increased)

```{r}
#| label: plot-aki-3
loess_plot(
  data = final_master, x = cc_percentile, y = AKI_g3_90days,
  x_point = cc_decile * 10, y_point = aki_3_rate_decile,
  title = "Grade >= 3 Creatinine Increased",
  xlab = "Percentile of SCR/CYS Ratio", ylab = "Grade >= 3 Creatinine Increased"
)
```

## 4.4 Overall Hospitalization

```{r}
#| label: plot-hosp
loess_plot(
  data = final_master, x = cc_percentile, y = hosp_90,
  x_point = cc_decile * 10, y_point = hos_rate_decile,
  title = "Overall Hospitalization",
  xlab = "Percentile of SCR/CYS Ratio", ylab = "Overall Hospitalization"
)
```

## 4.5 Platinum-Related Hospitalization

```{r}
#| label: plot-platinum-hosp
loess_plot(
  data = final_master, x = cc_percentile, y = platinum_related_hosp,
  x_point = cc_decile * 10, y_point = platinum_related_hos_rate_decile,
  title = "Hospitalization for Platinum-Associated AEs",
  xlab = "Percentile of SCR/CYS Ratio", ylab = "Hospitalization for Platinum-Associated AEs"
)
```

# 5 Cumulative Incidence Plots

## 5.1 Platinum-Related Hospitalization (Side Effect)

```{r}
#| label: cuminc-side-effect
fit_side_effect <- cuminc(
  Surv(cmp_time_side_effect, cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7,
  data = final_master
)

ggcuminc(fit_side_effect) +
  labs(
    title = "Platinum-Related Hospitalization",
    x = "Follow-up Time (Days)",
    y = "Cumulative Incidence"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.title    = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text     = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title  = element_blank(),
    legend.text   = element_text(size = 12)
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "blue"))
```
